full_description: Improve your concentration and efficiency with Focus Timer, a productivity app based on the Pomodoro Technique. This technique involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. After four cycles, you'll get a longer break of 15-30 minutes. This schedule helps you stay on track, avoid burnout, and maintain a sustainable work pace. Features include: customizable work and break intervals, notifications to keep you on schedule, and statistics to track your progress. Download Focus Timer now and start achieving your goals.
